nodes.label: AI for communication refinement
nodes.grounding_span: AI is good at offering alternative ways to state or communicate key points

nodes.label: AI as analytical delegate for data and research
nodes.grounding_span: detecting trends in date or research, deducing insights or context, I will sometimes defer the entire or initial task to AI

nodes.label: AI consistency in executive-level communication
nodes.grounding_span: AI isn't consistently successful in helping distill key points or reframing points to the right level of content desired for upper-level business management

nodes.label: AI as skill development enabler
nodes.grounding_span: I only see AI as a tool to improve my skills, not one to replace my skills

nodes.label: Effective communication and persuasion
nodes.grounding_span: help make the points connect in a fluid way to prevent hard transitions

nodes.label: Efficiency and accuracy in analytical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: detecting trends in date or research, deducing insights or context

nodes.label: Skill development and learning
nodes.grounding_span: I put my actions and growth in new challenges over leveraging AI as a tool when performing

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for communications
nodes.grounding_span: AI is good at offering alternative ways to state or communicate key points

nodes.label: Frustration with AI inconsistency for executive communication
nodes.grounding_span: AI isn't consistently successful in helping distill key points or reframing points to the right level of content desired for upper-level business management

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: I only see AI as a tool to improve my skills, not one to replace my skills

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: I only hope that my relationship with AI technologies in my work matures and grows

nodes.label: Collaborative iterative refinement — works back and forth with AI
nodes.grounding_span: I always draft my initial thoughts with rank them in priority to the conversation or presentation. I add the necessary details that I want to make sure build the context needed behind the points. And i ask AI to review and offer suggestions on structure or presentation.

nodes.label: Task-dependent delegation vs. collaboration
nodes.grounding_span: Around communications or refinement, it's very much a collaborator. For other tasks, such as detecting trends in date or research, deducing insights or context, I will sometimes defer the entire or initial task to AI and then review or double-check
